subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the realms of invincible glory, and from every letter thereof flow eyes that weep [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله نزلت بالحق من جبروت عز منیع و لکل حرف منها عیون تبکی
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God
